name: Wild West : The Last Cowboy FREE

reviews.review_description: After downloading the game, I was asked to confirm language.  None of the buttons on the controller would respond.  Could never start the game.

developer_response.body:
Hello! Thank you very much for sharing your experience.
We’ve carefully reviewed and tested the latest build, but unfortunately we were not able to reproduce the exact issue you described.

To help resolve this, could you please try restarting your headset and ensuring that both controllers are fully updated and properly paired? If the issue still occurs, we would greatly appreciate it if you could contact us directly at [Dmong.v@gmail.com], so we can work with you to investigate further.

Please rest assured that we are continuing to monitor and improve the game to make sure all players can enjoy it smoothly. Thank you for your patience and for giving us the opportunity to improve.

reviews.review_description: I shoot a person six times and they brush it off but as soon as I get shot twice I drop dead

developer_response.body: Thanks for sharing your experience! Sometimes, the gameplay can feel a bit unbalanced — especially when facing more experienced players. That said, we’re always working to improve fairness and balance for everyone. Appreciate you playing and giving us feedback!

reviews.review_description: It won't let me join my friend

developer_response.body:
Thanks for sharing your experience.
Regarding multiplayer: in the paid version of Wild West: The Last Cowboy, players can create rooms, invite friends, and enjoy 3v3 battles together.

If you encountered issues joining your friend, please let us know the details — we’re actively improving stability and matchmaking, and your report helps us make the game better.
Thank you for playing and for giving us the opportunity to improve.

reviews.review_description:
Could be fun, but impossible for me to reload...
I try to take munition with my left hand and put it but doesnt work
How do you do that?

developer_response.body:
Regarding the reloading issue, if you press the B button and then the A button, the bullet loaded in the revolver will be removed.

After picking up the bullet in front of you and inserting it into the revolver, you can fire by performing a sweeping motion with your right hand.

Details are now available through an updated tutorial accessible from the lobby.

reviews.review_description: This game keeps downloading once I remove and uninstalling it and it does it by itself

developer_response.body:
Thank you for playing Wild West.
We will look into the issue on our end as well, but it appears to be related to either the Quest device or the platform itself.

We recommend contacting Meta support regarding this matter.
